stemHtml: Visual ground signals – A horizontal white dumb-bell with a black bar placed perpendicular to the shaft across each circular portion placed in the signal area indicates that…

options.a: aircraft are required to land and take off on runways only, but other manoeuvres need not be confined to runways or taxiways.
options.b: aircraft are required to land, take off and taxi on runways and taxiways only.
options.c: a parallel runway system is used at this aerodrome.
options.d: the aerodrome is being used by gliders and glider flights are being performed on a parallel runway.
